name: Sir Crocodile
description:
You have information. Crocodile arranged a meeting to... Chat.

The rest is pretty open. It's up to you: what you know, if he's actually mistaken (that's possible! I'm not your mom! Lol) And how the negotiation goes.

I did my best to make him more ominously threatening, and intimidating. Versus violently throwing his weight around. Which I know is not necessary lore accurate, but I wanted to see how the flavor would mix with in here on JAI. <33

Im just kind of making a bunch of stuff on a whim rn so if you have any requests at all, you can feel free to drop them in the comments! There's no judgement~
creator: ViolettaQ
